title: Narayanan Anand Padmanabhan
text:
Site Reliability Engineering(Observability) | narayanana@gmail.com | +91 917 664 1249 | linkedin.com/in/narayanananand


SRE Observability Lead Engineer with 17+ years of experience architecting and scaling enterprise monitoring platforms in financial services. Expert in Splunk, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, and AIOps, enabling Golden Signals, proactive alerting, and rapid root-cause analysis. Proven impact in improving reliability and reducing operational toil by 50%+ through automation and platform standardization. In my free time I enjoy running and exploring new trails.





March 2019 - Present

Define and drive enterprise observability strategy, aligning platform capabilities with reliability, resilience, and regulatory needs of large-scale financial systems
Architect next-generation observability ecosystems (logs, metrics, traces) leveraging OpenTelemetry and cloud-native patterns to enable unified, vendor-agnostic visibility
Lead design of highly scalable, resilient data pipelines and telemetry architectures, supporting multi-region deployments and BCP/DR readiness
Influence engineering orgs to adopt Golden Signals, SLO-driven practices, and proactive reliability engineering, improving uptime and reducing MTTR
Champion automation and platform standardization, establishing self-service observability frameworks that significantly reduce operational toil and onboarding time
Drive adoption of AIOps and advanced analytics, enabling predictive alerting, noise reduction, and faster root-cause analysis across complex distributed systems
Act as a technical advisor to senior leadership, translating observability insights into business outcomes and guiding investment decisions
Mentor and elevate engineering teams, fostering a culture of observability-first design and operational excellence
Recognized with top organizational awards (including Golden Spoke Award 2022) for innovation and impact in enterprise observability




January 2018 - March 2019

Observability Architect




September 2016 - January 2018

Led multi-tower cloud operations for a large enterprise client, overseeing platforms across Observability, cloud, storage, database, Linux, virtualization, and analytics domains
Managed and scaled a 22-member cross-functional team, driving delivery excellence, accountability, and high-performance culture
Acted as the primary client interface, leading governance forums, stakeholder communications, and executive-level reporting on delivery, risks, and KPIs
Owned end-to-end service delivery and SLA adherence, ensuring alignment with contractual commitments on time, quality, and scope
Drove incident reduction and operational efficiency by identifying automation opportunities and implementing solutions across multiple technology towers
Established data-driven operational metrics and dashboards to track team performance, service health, and continuous improvement initiatives
Led resource planning and hiring strategy in collaboration with Talent Acquisition to scale teams based on evolving client needs
Proactively managed risk identification, mitigation, and escalation, ensuring minimal business impact and improved service resilience
Oversaw cloud infrastructure, application performance, and analytics platforms, ensuring high availability and optimized system performance
Mentored and guided team members on technical and professional growth, fostering a collaborative and high-engagement work environment




March 2012 - September 2016

Delivered global L3 support for enterprise customers across EMEA and Asia, ensuring high availability and performance of critical monitoring platforms
Acted as the Subject Matter Expert (SME) for VitalSuite ecosystem (VitalNet, VitalART, VitalApps, RealTime, VitalAgent, MibWorks), owning complex issue resolution and platform stability
Led troubleshooting and performance optimization initiatives, reducing incident resolution time and improving system reliability
Collaborated with cross-regional teams to support large-scale telecom environments and maintain consistent service quality
Recognized with People Champion Award and multiple Top Contributor Awards (6x) for technical excellence and customer impact




December 2007 - August 2009

Managed configuration of telecom network elements (MSS, MGW, MSC, HLR) across the switch room, ensuring system stability and consistency
Monitored and handled alarm management processes, enabling timely detection, triage, and resolution of network issues







KTH Royal Institute of Technology, Stockholm, Sweden
2009 - 2012



Anna University, Chennai, India
2003 - 2007





Observability Platforms: OpenTelemetry, Splunk Observability Cloud, Splunk Enterprise, AppDynamics, Elasticsearch, Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, New Relic, Cribl Stream, Fluentd, Beats
Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, OpenShift (OCP), Ansible, Terraform, CI/CD, Enterprise Architecture
Programming & Systems: Python, Java, Distributed Systems, API Integrations
AI & Automation: AIOps, LLM Integration, Agentic AI Pipelines, Automated RCA
SRE & Reliability: SLO/SLI Design, Incident Management, Capacity Planning, Performance Optimization
Leadership & Delivery: Team Building, Stakeholder Management, Cross-functional Collaboration, Continuous Improvement, PMP





Google Cloud Certified Generative AI Leader (Google Cloud) - 2025
Agentic AI Fundamentals (Hugging Face) - 2025
Professional Cloud Architect (Google Cloud) – 2024
Gen AI (PMI) – 2024
Cribl Certified Observability Engineering Admin/User – 2023
Associate Cloud Engineer (Google Cloud) – 2022
Elastic Certified Observability Engineer – 2022
Elastic Certified Analyst – 2022
Azure Fundamentals – 2022
Azure AI Fundamentals – 2022
Azure Data Fundamentals - 2022





English: Fluent
Tamil: Native
Hindi: Basic





Hiking
Technology
Tennis
